(2) A copy of order of the competent authority approving the alteration, shall be filed with the Registrar in Form No.
INC.27 with fee together with the printed copy of the altered articles within fifteen days of the receipt of the order from
the Central Government.
Explanation.- For the purposes of this sub-rule, the term “competent authority” means, the Central Government.

--- PAGE 14 ---
120 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (2) A copy of order of the competent authority approving the alteration, shall be filed with the Registrar in Form No.
INC.27 with fee together with the printed copy of the altered articles within fifteen days of the receipt of the order from
the Central Government.
Explanation.- For the purposes of this sub-rule, the term “competent authority” means, the Central Government. 34. Copies of memorandum and articles, etc.
